title: Lifecycle
text:
- `glm-4.7` ([zai-org/GLM-4.7-FP8](https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-4.7-FP8)) was updated to `glm-5` ([nvidia/GLM-5.1-NVFP4](https://huggingface.co/nvidia/GLM-5.1-NVFP4))
- `olmo` ([allenai/Olmo-3.1-32B-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3.1-32B-Instruct)) has been removed due to lack of usage.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>April 2026</summary>

- `gemma3` was renamed to `gemma` and switched from [google/gemma-3-27b-it](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-3-27b-it) to [google/gemma-4-31B-it](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-31B-it). Context size changed.
- `qwen3-small` switched from [Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B) to [Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B); context size changed.
- `gemma-small` ([google/gemma-4-E4B-it](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-E4B-it)) was added with **audio input** support.
- `minimax-m2` upgraded from [MiniMax-M2.5](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5) to [MiniMax-M2.7](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.7).
- `kimi` upgraded from [Kimi-K2.5](https://huggingface.co/moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5) to [Kimi-K2.6](https://huggingface.co/moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6).

</details>

<details>
  <summary>March 2026</summary>

- `qwen3-embedding` ([Qwen/Qwen3-VL-Embedding-8B](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-Embedding-8B)) added on the AI Gateway.
- `embed-mistral` ([intfloat/e5-mistral-7b-instruct](https://huggingface.co/intfloat/e5-mistral-7b-instruct)) decommissioned and replaced with `qwen3-embedding` due to incompatibilities with Jupyter AI.
- `llama3-sdsc` ([Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct)) **removed** from the Envoy AI Gateway after a long deprecation.
- `glm-v` (GLM-4.6V multimodal route) **removed** from the Envoy AI Gateway. Use `glm-4.7` for text and other multimodal options for vision/video.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>February 2026</summary>
